references.text: Kong, H-Z. 2000. Taxonomic notes on Chloranthus henryi Hemsl. and its allies. Acta Phytotaxonomica Sinica 38: 355-365.
Middleton, DJ, S Lindsay & N Taylor. 2020. (2731) Proposal to reject the name Chloranthus elatior (Chloranthaceae). Taxon 69: 201-201
Verdcourt, B. 1986. Chloranthaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 123-144
Yang, TYA, Chiang, T-Y, Peng, C-I & T-W Hsu. 2006. Chloranthus henryi Hemsl. (Chloranthaceae), a new record to the Flora of Taiwan. Taiwania 51: 283-286

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 14 May 2026

species.citation: C.B.Rob. , PJS 4c (1909) 70 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 22; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 139. = Ascarina reticulata Merr. , PJS 12c (1917) 70 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 22.
species.distribution: Borneo, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Apayao (photos), Ilocos Norte, Nueva Ecija, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, MINDORO, PANAY.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 4 May 2026

species.citation: Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 79 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 21; Middleton et al., Taxon 69 (2020) 201. = Chloranthus elatior Link , Enum. Hort. Berol. Alt. 1 (1821) 140. = Chloranthus erectus (Buch.-Ham.) Verdc. , Kew Bull. 40 (1985) 217 ; Wall., Numer. List 230 (1832) no. 6881, nom. illeg.; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 131; ≡ Cryphaea erecta Buch.-Ham. , Edinburgh J. Sci. 2 (1825) 11.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, China, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines. BASILAN, BILIRAN, CEBU (photos), LUZON: Abra (photos), Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Batangas, Cagayan (photos), Camarines Sur, Cavite, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Davao del Sur (photos), Zamboanga del Sur (photos), MINDORO (photos), NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), SAMAR.
species.notes: Throughout Malesia; throughout the Philippines, forests. 20-1450(-2525)m.

species.citation: Solms , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 16(1) (1869) 476 ; Kong, Acta Phytotax. Sin. 38 (2000) 355; Yang et al., Taiwania 51 (2006) 283. = Chloranthus philippinensis Merr. , PJS 7c (1912) 259 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 22. = Chloranthus verticillatus Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 3 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 22. ≠ Chloranthus henryi auct. non Hemsl. ; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 133.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Cagayan, Ifugao, Nueva Vizcaya (photos).

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 31 July 2022

species.citation: Merr. & Chun , Sunyatsenia 5 (1940) 36 ; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 144.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, ?Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Vietnam. ?MINDANAO: ?Misamis Occidental.
species.notes: Pelser (31-Jul-22): Gaerlan, Sagcal & Romero PPI 10812 (L) from Mt Malindang possibly represents this species in the Philippines. 1000-2365m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 26 May 2024

species.citation: (Thunb.) Nakai , Fl. Sylv. Kor. 18 (1930) 17 ; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 134; ≡ Chloranthus glaber (Thunb.) Makino , Bot. Mag. (Tokyo) 26 (1912) 386; ≡ Bladhia glabra Thunb. , Trans. Linn. Soc. London, 1st Ser. 2 (1794) 331. ssp. brachystachys (Blume) Verdc., Kew Bull. 40 (1985) 216; Verdc., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 134; ≡ Chloranthus brachystachys Blume, Fl. Javae Chloranth. (1828) 13; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 21. Distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. CEBU, LUZON: Albay, Bataan, Benguet, La Union, Pampanga, Rizal, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis, Misamis Occidental, Zamboanga del Norte, NEGROS. Notes: Widely distributed throughout the Philippines in medium to high elevation primary forests. 135-2550m. Native.
species.distribution: BASILAN, BILIRAN, CAMIGUIN (photos), CEBU, LEYTE (photos), LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan (photos), Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis, Misamis Occidental, South Cotabato, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos).
